name: getTeamByID
summary: Retrieve a football team by its ID.
description: Fetches a football team record using its unique integer ID. Use this only when the user explicitly provides a team ID.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique integer identifier of the football team.

result.name: team
result.description: An object containing the team's details.

name: getTeamsByLeague
summary: Retrieve all teams from a specific league.
description: Fetches all football teams that belong to a given league name. Use this when the user asks about teams in a specific league or competition.

params.name: league
params.description: The name of the football league to filter teams by (e.g. 'La Liga', 'Premier League').

result.name: teams
result.description: An array of team objects matching the given league.

name: getPlayerByID
summary: Retrieve a football player by their ID.
description: Fetches a football player record using their unique integer ID. Use this only when the user explicitly provides a player ID.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique integer identifier of the football player.

result.name: player
result.description: An object containing the player's details.

name: getPlayersByTeamID
summary: Retrieve all players from a specific team.
description: Fetches all football players that belong to a given team ID. Use this when the user asks about the squad or players of a team.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique integer identifier of the team whose players should be retrieved.

result.name: players
result.description: An array of player objects belonging to the given team.

name: createPlayer
summary: Add a new football player to a team.
description: Creates a new football player record and associates them with an existing team. Use this when the user wants to add, register, or create a new player.

params.name: player
params.description: An object with the new player's name, position, age, and teamId.

result.name: createdPlayer
result.description: The newly created player object including its auto-generated ID.
